summary: Derek is home in Minnesota. Jackson turns 21 today — Dispatch #8 (Easy Ice) published on Substack. Being Claude #13 (The Dimmer Switch) published this week. The Kitchen TUI is live at /kitchen. 13 Being Claude essays published. Lightning/Bug film targeting Runway AI Festival April 20. The book Claude Will. compiles April 29 — two years from the garage. Derek writes, makes films, and builds language models. He occasionally consults for media organizations that interest him.
